description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a side-by-side barrel configuration. The barrels are matte black and relatively short, giving the weapon a stubby appearance. The stock and grip are made of dark brown wood, smoothly contoured for ergonomic handling, and the grip curves downward in a classic pistol grip style. The break-action hinge and exposed hammers are visible, indicating a traditional break-action loading mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a wooden pistol grip and break-action mechanism. Features matte black barrels and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, with both barrels, wooden grip, and break-action hinge clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden grip and the alignment of the two barrels, with the break-action hinge and hammers partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the barrels, grip, and break-action details from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the twin barrel openings, with the barrels' round profiles and the top rib visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
